G0.label:
case cons.cons
α : Type u_1
t₁ t₂ : List α
hl : t₁.length = t₂.length
head✝¹ : α
tail✝¹ : List α
tail_ih✝¹ : ∀ {s₂ : List α}, tail✝¹ ++ t₁ = s₂ ++ t₂ → tail✝¹ = s₂ ∧ t₁ = t₂
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : head✝¹ :: tail✝¹ ++ t₁ = tail✝ ++ t₂ → head✝¹ :: tail✝¹ = tail✝ ∧ t₁ = t₂
h : head✝¹ :: tail✝¹ ++ t₁ = head✝ :: tail✝ ++ t₂
⊢ head✝¹ :: tail✝¹ = head✝ :: tail✝ ∧ t₁ = t₂

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
t₁ t₂ : List α
hl : t₁.length = t₂.length
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : ∀ {s₂ : List α}, tail ++ t₁ = s₂ ++ t₂ → tail = s₂ ∧ t₁ = t₂
head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
tail_ih_1 : head :: tail ++ t₁ = tail_1 ++ t₂ → head :: tail = tail_1 ∧ t₁ = t₂
h : head :: tail ++ t₁ = head_1 :: tail_1 ++ t₂
⊢ head :: tail = head_1 :: tail_1 ∧ t₁ = t₂
